div1.entryFree:
Core, 1) the heart, the central part: most putrefied c. so fair without, Troil. V, 8, 1. in my heart's c., ay, in my heart of heart, Hml. III, 2, 78.
2) an ulcer or boil: were not that a botchy c.? Troil. II, 1, 7. thou c. of envy, V, 1, 4 (Q cur). In both passages quibbling with 'heart.'
